data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Verified beat search now matches full IDs, numeric suffixes, and aliases in both beads and knots backends; the beats page omits the state filter when q is present so ID lookup can find beats regardless of current state filter. Reviewed tests covering backend contract parity, beads backend ID/suffix/alias search, knots backend ID/suffix/alias search, and beats page param behavior. Re-ran sanity gates in /private/tmp/foolery-1789-impl: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
